title: Fix flaky m95-profiler-instrumentation test — timing threshold too tight
description: test/m95-profiler-instrumentation.test.js line 38: expect(elapsed).toBeLessThan(8) fails intermittently (got 9ms). The overwrite-startMark test expects <8ms but timer jitter on CI/local can exceed this. Widen threshold to 20ms or use a relative assertion. Error log: AssertionError: expected 9 to be less than 8
